title: Maven, What Are You Waiting For?!
summary: As part of my new job at Decodable, I am also planning to contribute to the Apache Flink project (as Decodable’s fully-managed stream processing platform is based on Flink). Right now, I am in the process of familiarizing myself with the Flink code base, and as such I am of course building the project from source, too.
